channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: White House taps the guy who keeps crying ‘aliens’ to run UFO group
item.description: Harvard astrophysicist Avi Loeb will head the UAP Science Advisory Council established by the White House, the Pentagon, the Office of the Director of National Intelligence, the FBI, and "the intelligence community." The Council will provide scientific reports and advice to the UAP Governing Board, in an effort to "resolve the nature of UAP," or […]...

item.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
item.description: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

item.title: Engadget review recap: Steam Machine, Samsung Music Studio 7, Oura Ring 5 and more
item.description: A roundup of recent reviews published by Engadget.

item.title: J’ai testé le DJI Lito X1, le drone d’entrée de gamme qui a tout d’un pro
item.description: Avec son excellent capteur hérité du Mini 4 Pro, son LiDAR frontal et ses nombreux automatismes de vol, le DJI Lito X1 entend rendre les technologies les plus avancées du constructeur accessibles à un plus large public. On fait le point sur ses atouts.

item.title: 'We're so close to the streamers inventing television': Disney+ is reportedly thinking about a fully free tier supported by adverts
item.description: How many ads would you be prepared to put up with if it meant you could access some Disney+ content for free?

item.title: Your Samsung Gallery won't be able to sync with Microsoft OneDrive soon
item.description: Your photos don't have to go home, but they can't stay here.

item.title: Argentine-Suisse : comment voir le quart de finale de la Coupe du monde 2026 en streaming ?
item.description: L'Argentine et la Suisse s'affrontent cette nuit en quart de finale de la Coupe du monde 2026. Voici à quelle heure, sur quelle chaîne et comment regarder le match en direct et en streaming, que vous soyez devant votre télévision ou sur votre smartphone.

item.title: 'Users no longer need to choose between powerful AI capabilities and meaningful privacy protections': Proton makes its Lumo privacy-first ChatGPT alternative a lot more powerful
item.description: Proton's Lumo 2.0 finally looks like a real ChatGPT rival with reasoning, image generation, web search, and memory baked in.

item.title: Avec 200 € en poche, quel smartphone pas cher choisir entre le Samsung Galaxy A17 5G et le Nothing Phone (3a) Lite ?
item.description: Vous cherchez à vous procurer un nouveau smartphone avec un budget de moins de 200 euros ? Le classique Samsung Galaxy A17 5G et l'audacieux Nothing Phone (3a) Lite voient leur prix chuter pendant les soldes. Mais lequel mérite votre argent ? On fait le point pour vous.

item.title: Bluesky has an official CEO again
item.description: Toni Schneider, who took over after Jay Graber stepped down, is now Bluesky's official CEO.

item.title: South Africa vs Scotland Free Streams: How to watch Nations Championship 2026 game, TV Channels, Preview
item.description: All the ways to watch South Africa vs Scotland live streams online – including for FREE – as the Scots try to shock the Springboks in the Nations Championship.

item.title: ICE are heavily armed killers. They’re also huge losers
item.description: Donald Trump's Homeland Security regime has been at the center of two critical stories in the past two weeks. In the first, federal agents shot and killed a man and quickly got to work justifying the use of force under the flimsiest of pretenses. In the other, it made house calls to people who said […]

item.title: How to watch Muchova vs Nosková for FREE: Wimbledon 2026 Women's final live streams and TV channels
item.description: All the ways to watch Karolina Muchova vs Linda Nosková online and from anywhere as the two Czech players commence battle in the Wimbledon final.

item.title: I went to the Goodwood Festival of Speed 2026 —here are the top 5 EVs and concept cars I saw, from BYD to Mercedes
item.description: The coolest electric cars and concepts from Goodwood Festival of Speed 2026

item.title: I took the new Sony RX10 V superzoom and a pro Sony mirrorless camera with 400-800mm lens on a bird photography trip — here’s how the two systems compared
item.description: Can Sony’s new RX10 V replace pro Sony mirrorless camera gear? Here are the real-world differences
